Final homes

Oakdene Heights

Oakdene Heights is a limited collection of contemporary family homes designed to sit lightly in a wooded Surrey setting, balancing sculptural architecture with privacy and long views.

Shalford, Surrey

Contemporary homes in a peaceful setting close to nature.

Homes
6 contemporary homes
Bedrooms
5 bedrooms
Price guide
From GBP 1,150,000

Why it works

Designed around daily life, long-term value and place.

Kingsvale homes are planned from the outside in: approach, light, privacy, storage, garden access and everyday flow are resolved before the decorative layer is added.

  • Large glazing and vaulted principal rooms oriented to green outlooks.
  • Detached garaging, EV charging and generous utility spaces.
  • Premium appliance packages and considered lighting design.
  • Low-energy specification with solar-ready roof zones.
